name: wheelwise
description: A product and engineering decision skill pack for turning ideas into an evidence-based Chinese report folder with project-state, evidence-board, report.md, visualized index.html, independent prototype.html, assets, and execution plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate progressive Chinese reports with visuals, demos, HTML display, and execution plans.
interface.longDescription: WheelWise is a multi-skill product decision pack that structures raw ideas, manages project state and evidence boards, controls feasibility gates, researches market/customer/commercial evidence, reviews feasibility and risk, evaluates existing solutions, creates dense visual briefs, turns report.md into a visualized index.html, creates an independent prototype.html or simulator, and produces one complete Chinese report folder with project-state.md, evidence-board.md, report.md, index.html, prototype.html, assets, and an execution plan.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-wheelwise to evaluate this product idea.
Use $using-wheelwise to decide what to build, buy, reuse, fork, or reference.
Use $using-wheelwise to create a V4.1 wheelwise-report folder with project-state.md, evidence-board.md, report.md, visualized index.html, independent prototype.html, and assets for this idea.
